sql_array: CREATE TABLE Employees (FirstName VARCHAR(50), LastName VARCHAR(50), Title VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO Employees (FirstName, LastName, Title) VALUES ('Nancy', 'Davolio', 'Sales Representative');
INSERT INTO Employees (FirstName, LastName, Title) VALUES ('Janet', 'Leverling', 'Sales Representative');

SELECT XMLELEMENT ('Emp', XMLATTRIBUTES ('Sales Representative' as "Title"), XMLAGG (XMLELEMENT ('Name', CONCAT(FirstName, ' ', LastName)))) FROM Employees WHERE Title = 'Sales Representative' ORDER BY FirstName;
UPDATE Employees SET Title = 'Senior Sales Representative' WHERE LastName = 'King';
